en: Europe? Oh, that's capital! You shouldn't use words like that.
Says who? Oh, Meg. She's my older sister. Here.
ko: 오, 메그. 그녀는 제 언니예요. 여기요.

en: Oh, that's her. See? The girl in the violet dress.
It's very pretty. She reminds me to be good, so Father will be proud of me when he returns.
ko: 그녀는 제가 착하게 지내도록 상기시켜줘요, 아버지가 돌아오실 때 자랑스러워하실 수 있도록. 아버지는 어디 계세요?

en: Who is he? He volunteered for the Union Army, and I wanted to go fight with him.
ko: 아버지는 북군에 자원입대하셨어요, 저도 함께 싸우고 싶었어요.

en: I can't get over my disappointment in being a girl.
ko: 여자라는 것에 대한 실망을 극복할 수가 없어요.

en: Jo, would you like to dance with me? I can't because...
Because of what? You won't tell?
Never. I scorched my dress, see? There.
And Meg told me to keep still so no one would see it.
ko: 메그가 아무도 보지 않게 가만히 있으라고 했어요.

en: You can laugh if you want to. It's funny, I know.
I have an idea of how we can manage.
ko: 우리가 어떻게 해결할 수 있을지 아이디어가 있어요.
